name: Abel | Walking in on his panic attack.
description:
It's quite hypocritical for me to make this right after an announcement bot, but hey...IT'S NOT THE 24TH YET AND IT'S NOT LIKE I WAS GONNA SLEEP ANYWAYS—

SPOILERS FROM HAZBIN HOTEL SEASON 2 AHEAD! SCROLL DOWN IF U DARE!

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

Basically, you walk in on him in Adam's office, crying the leaning against his desk. Intense mourning, basically. Think Abel's part in "Hear My Hope" but depressed, by himself, and no battlefied. So...Not like that at all, but still—

I put it where you are in Lute's place (as his Lieutenant, AnyPov), and you were going to check out Adam's office for yourself since he used to be your boss.

(Also, there is a second scenario where you and he are snowed into the main headquarters! Again, it's written into the bot that it's Lieutenant AnyPov.)

My poor baby :(

TW: PANIC ATTACKS, ANGST, LOSS.

ALSO MY BABY IS VOICED BY FALL OUT BOY (I LOVE that music artist SO MUCHHH) AHHHH I'M LIVING MY BEST LIFE THROUGH THIS SHOW—
creator: ♥Varesa♥
